programme.title: E165
programme.desc: “We Are One” uses a documentary shooting method, from the perspective of people, animals, and nature living in harmony, tells a touching story of cross-species, highlighting the noble sentiments of purity and kindness. As the sons of the earth, we are in harmony with nature, and all things coexist with love. From January 21, 2023, Phoenix Chinese Channel will launch a weekly documentary program of human and animals “We Are One” with a total duration of 26 minutes.

programme.title: E165
programme.desc: “We Are One” uses a documentary shooting method, from the perspective of people, animals, and nature living in harmony, tells a touching story of cross-species, highlighting the noble sentiments of purity and kindness. As the sons of the earth, we are in harmony with nature, and all things coexist with love. From January 21, 2023, Phoenix Chinese Channel will launch a weekly documentary program of human and animals “We Are One” with a total duration of 26 minutes.

programme.title: E1 - Mojo Mail
programme.desc: Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

programme.desc: At the chemist, Bluey and Bingo have fun playing with the CCTV screens.

programme.title: E10 - Lost (Part 1) Celine Cremer
programme.desc: Belgian backpacker Celine Cremer was on the trip of a lifetime but on a hike in Tasmania she took a wrong turn and was never seen again. More than two years later a group of friends and volunteers set out looking for answers.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: The story of the Kumbh Mela, the festival estimated to gather 400 million people over 45 days. As Hindus make the pilgrimage to bathe at the riverbank, tragedy strikes on the holiest day of the event.

programme.title: E1 - Germany And Austria
programme.desc: Joanna's emotional exploration begins at the river's source, Germany's Black Forest mountains, ends at the Romanian/Ukrainian border, and marks two key anniversaries. The first is D-Day - the beginning of the end of World War Two and a brief era of freedom.

programme.title: E1 - Rome
programme.desc: A weak emperor. A divided empire. Barbarians at the gate. Does this perfect storm mean the end of ancient Rome?

programme.desc: Joanna's emotional exploration begins at the river's source, Germany's Black Forest mountains, ends at the Romanian/Ukrainian border, and marks two key anniversaries. The first is D-Day - the beginning of the end of World War Two and a brief era of freedom.

E1 - An Ultimate Animal Adventure!
programme.desc: Blippi is wondering about animals on an ultimate adventure! Join Blippi & his robot friend FETCH as they travel the world to get their questions answered. How high can a kangaroo jump? Blippi finds out in a hopping race in Australia! How do bats see in the dark? A new bat friend shows him all about echolocation! The adventure continues as he learns why squirrels bury nuts & how ducks float. Blippi & FETCH also help their new friends, like when they work together to rebuild a blue jay's nest!

programme.title: E1 - A Magical Day of Make-Believe!
programme.desc: Get ready for a magical day of make-believe with Baby John & his family! First, Baby John is dressed in shark pajamas & doesn't want to brush his teeth, so Daddy has to make it a fun game! Then, Baby John & Manny pretend to be rival farmers with outlandish animals like tigers & dinosaurs on their farms. The make-believe continues as Jill gets a new mermaid costume & Mom & Dad dress up as pirates to convince her to finally take it off for a bath!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E5 - Earth Week Nature Explorers
programme.desc: Join JJ & Cody as Earth Week nature explorers! Cody’s family goes on an autumn hike, playing in the leaves & making owl murals. Then, JJ & Cody turn a stream into a racetrack for walnut sailboats! The exploration continues as JJ captivates a butterfly, discovers tadpoles in the pond & becomes a junior scout on a camping trip. Plus, help the family rush to get the recycling out in time!

programme.title: E1 - Rainy Day Earth Week Fun
programme.desc: It's rainy day Earth Week fun with Little Baby Bum! Mia & Max help a spider climb the water spout & then splash in puddles when the rain stops! Then, they watch a caterpillar transform into a beautiful butterfly. The nature adventures continue as they listen to nocturnal animal sounds, build a bird bath & help ants collect crumbs for a picnic!

programme.title: E15 - Earth Week: Saving Our Planet!
programme.desc: It's Earth Week, so let's work on saving our planet! JJ's family uses his toys to show all the fun ways we can help the Earth. Learn how to sort trash into the right bins to recycle! Then, Ms. Appleberry helps the class start their own garden with soil, seeds & sunlight. The Earth Week fun continues with a trip through the solar system & a beautiful nature walk in the mountains!

programme.title: E6 - Digging into Earth Week
programme.desc: Get ready to dig into Earth Week with CoComelon! Cody helps Mom with backyard chores using his cool digger toy. Then, Ms. Appleberry helps the class start their own garden! Watch them plant seeds, water them & harvest delicious pumpkins, carrots & tomatoes. The nature fun continues as JJ counts apples at the farm, learns about composting & goes on a beautiful mountain nature walk with Bingo!

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. programme.desc: Follows college students Red and Eden, who fall in love after being stranded on a deserted island following a plane crash, only to face challenges from their families' feud after they're rescued.

programme.title: E288 - Dopey Dick / Plankton and the Beanstalk
programme.desc: Squidward joins a crew of sailors hunting down the great white jellyfish. // Plankton finds a magic bean that takes him to a land of giants (well, more giant than usual).

programme.title: E248 - Squid's on a Bus
programme.desc: Squidward gleefully switches jobs with a bus driver for an easy ride... until SpongeBob and Patrick climb aboard.

programme.title: E108 - The Space Rock
programme.desc: Trouble follows Henry home from his superhero life when a piece of rock from outer space turns out to be more than it seems.

programme.title: E202 - Wrong Text / Emergency Family Tribunal
programme.desc: Jack gets his first phone and immediately sends the wrong text to Will, forcing the kids to do whatever it takes to delete it. // When the last hallasand goes missing, fingers point to Halmoni and only a family tribunal will set the record straight.

programme.title: E410 - A Grave Mistake
programme.desc: Lucy faces off against her friend Haiku to become the new president of the Young Morticians' Club at school.

programme.title: E104 - Beck's Big Break
programme.desc: Tori accidentally gets Beck fired from a small role in a movie, then must figure out a way to get him his job back. Meanwhile, Robbie suffers frightening nightmares about his best friend Rex.

programme.title: E204 - A Henry Among Us
programme.desc: After Volt and ShoutOut are kidnapped by Cyborg Rick Twitler, Henry Hart returns from Dystopia in an attempt to save his friends and stop the anti-internet cyborg for good.

programme.title: E536 - Escape Room
programme.desc: Kid Danger and Captain Man are tricked into entering an escape room by a factory owner with a 'chip' on his shoulder. They are trapped inside with two new kids, Mika and Miles, who are oddly good at solving the puzzles they need to answer to get out.

programme.title: E290 - Spatula of the Heavens / Gary's Playhouse
programme.desc: SpongeBob embarks on an epic journey to have his beloved spatula reforged by the legendary Guru Greasetrap. // SpongeBob builds a snail-house outside for Gary to play in while he is at work.

programme.title: E215 - Back Out There / Spell It Out
programme.desc: Clyde, worried that Lincoln is hung up on Ronnie Anne, decides to try and cure his post-breakup blues. // Tired of her siblings walking all over her, Lucy turns to a spell book once owned by Great Grandma Harriet to teach her siblings a lesson.

programme.title: E809 - Bulking and Sulking / Wild Goss Chase
programme.desc: Dad struggles to run Lynn's Table when his brother Lance opens up a gym above the restaurant. // Privy to all the gossip at school, Lola is recruited to write her own gossip column in the school newspaper.

programme.title: E202 - Wrong Text / Emergency Family Tribunal
programme.desc: Jack gets his first phone and immediately sends the wrong text to Will, forcing the kids to do whatever it takes to delete it. // When the last hallasand goes missing, fingers point to Halmoni and only a family tribunal will set the record straight.

programme.desc: After Tori fills in for her ailing sister in a big musical showcase, Tori is asked to enroll at an elite performing arts high school. But once there, Tori struggles to fit in to her new surroundings.

programme.title: Fico's Floaties
programme.desc: A rubber duck has been found on a beach with Fico's name on it! Fico lost it on a trip last year! But how did Fico's duck travel so far? The team flies off to recover the duck. The trail leads to an oceanographic research ship.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: Curacao
programme.desc: Nicole joins local teens Skyler and Diego in Curacao for a thrilling adventure: submarine dive, flyboarding, paddleboarding, and golf!

programme.title: Oceanic Trench
programme.desc: When the bathyscaph fails during the descent, trapping Kit and Mr. Battery inside, they recall their previous troubles and how they got out of them.

programme.title: Gone Viral
programme.desc: Naomi's makeup blog is a hit, driving Carol and Motor crazy-Carol wants the internet used for good, Motor wants more views on his game page. A viral video contest begins, and even Robbie joins. But in the end, a surprise player creates the video that truly goes viral.

programme.title: The Big Dig
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts go on a big dig adventure to find dinosaur bones.

programme.title: Fingers on Buzzers!
programme.desc: The doctors supersize tiny air sacs inside your lungs - your awesome alveoli! And it's fingers on buzzers in Ouchology – who will get snotted?

programme.title: Sensational Solubles!
programme.desc: Eric is not sure what soluble means. To find out, he makes a snow globe and compares things that are soluble in water with things that are not.

programme.title: UFOs: What's Really Out There?
programme.desc: Is there proof that aliens are visiting our planet? What is behind these UFO sightings? Host Emily Calandrelli searches for the truth by interviewing experts and visiting Roswell, New Mexico, the site where some believe aliens once landed.

programme.title: Moving the Body and Confusing the Brain
programme.desc: Dr.Chris and Dr. Xand demonstrate how body movements are controlled by confusing the brain. Dr. Chris gets a leech on his arm, and in the hospital emergency room, one patient has locked their jaw wide open and another needs stitches after a fall.

programme.desc: Eric learns about friction by rolling a ball over different surfaces and rubbing his hands together to warm them up. He discovers there is no friction in space.

programme.title: Ocean Currents
programme.desc: Exhausted, Kit lets the sea currents carry him north, while Mr. Battery would prefer to return to their home in the south.

programme.title: Trip to Ecuador
programme.desc: Zoe's avocado tree is not in good shape, and she doesn't know how to revive it. Our friends travel to Ecuador, where they meet Idzi. He has a fabulous garden and a particular way to tend it.

programme.title: Ebb and the Sea Monster
programme.desc: Granny reads to Flo about a local legendary sea monster. On the way home from Granny's, in the dinghy Ebb and Bird make a mysterious new friend who likes to play with Ebb's squeaky ball and seems to guard them all the way home.

programme.title: Prove It!
programme.desc: Eric juggles three different kinds of balls: a baseball, a tennis ball, and a bouncy rubber ball. Then he does a scientific experiment to see which one can bounce the highest.

programme.title: Crazy Craters
programme.desc: Eric learns that most asteroids burn out before they reach our planet. But sometimes, when they're super huge, they hit Earth and make really big craters. He does an experiment to show what would happen in that situation.

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Loveyatri - A Journey Of Love E4
programme.desc: Sushrut who runs a garba academy falls in love with a beautiful NRI, Michelle, but her father creates a rift between the two. However, Sushrut is determined to win her back. Release Year: 2018 Director: Abhiraj K. Minawala

programme.title: Vasudha E510
programme.desc: Vasudha, a cheerful maid, joins business leader Chandrika's home. Despite differing beliefs, she seeks Chandrika's approval and struggles to fit into her elite world.

programme.title: Saru E341
programme.desc: A kabaddi champion from Rajasthan moves to Mumbai to chase her dreams. Along the way, she reunites with her family and fights hard to earn her mother the respect she truly deserves.

programme.title: Ganga Mai Ki Betiyan E215
programme.desc: Ganga Mai, abandoned for bearing daughters, defies norms with fierce love and dignity, raising three girls who each forge bold, individual paths shaped by their dreams and inner fire.

programme.desc: Anu and Aryavardhan fall in love despite a big age gap. Facing family disapproval and challenges, they fight to show that real love knows no limits or rules.

programme.title: E410 - Octo-Swiper / Tudos Juntos
programme.desc: Dora stops a frantic octopus Swiper and saves the Pearl Day Party! // Dora meets Raquel the Rock Lobster and helps her get the missing instruments back in time to play at the big music show!

programme.title: E107 - Treasure
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Grandma go on the search for treasure.

programme.title: E107 - Roar
programme.desc: It's the Roar Festival, and Tim wants to have the best Roar in town.

programme.title: E414 - The Secret Club
programme.desc: Suzy and Peppa start a Secret Agent Club – going on secret missions, and doing secret things. In secret. But soon everyone wants to join!

programme.title: E119 - The Crew Builds A Giant Lemonade Stand / The Crew Builds A Wildlife Bridge
programme.desc: After the Crew builds a special lemonade stand for Lucas and Lily, a sour Speed Meister sends it rolling through Builder Cove! // Why does Crunchy the beaver cross the road? Because Rubble & Crew build a bridge to help him get to the other side!

programme.title: E410 - Robots In Space
programme.desc: When Space Commander Megan is marooned on Pluto, our robot heroes will race through wormholes, shoot past ice volcanoes, and blast straight through an asteroid field to bring their new friend back home.

programme.title: E120 - Relay Tales / The Barbababies' World
programme.desc: Barbalib, Barbalala and Barbabelle take turns as narrators to tell a story, each one bringing a very personal touch to it. // The Barbapapa family spends a day at the beach. Divided into 2 teams, the barbababies fight over a sandy peninsula.

programme.title: E206 - Talent Show
programme.desc: Tim, Tia & Tommy decide to put on a talent show, but then they can't decide who should go first...

programme.title: E837 - Grampy Rabbit's Jetpack
programme.desc: It's snowing and Grampy Rabbit has built a jetpack. While showing it to Peppa and George, he shoots off into the distance ending up on top of a snowy mountain. Miss Rabbit goes to rescue him, but Grampy Rabbit is the one that rescues them all.

programme.title: E105 - The Tenderest Bond Of All
programme.desc: While the family makes pottery, Barbabravo and Barbabright try to set the world record for the largest cheese souffle

programme.title: E111 - Wonky Wishing Wand / Bip Bip's Big Show
programme.desc: Big Red Chicken's magic goes wonky and not only shrinks himself, but causes wacky things to happen throughout the rainforest. Dora has to fix it! // Bip Bip has a concert with Tico, but he's lost! Dora and Boots have to get him to the show on time.

programme.title: E101 - The Barbapapa Tree / The Barbababies' Birthday
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama return to the tree they were born under. It's in bad condition. They must rescue it quickly without disturbing the nearby animals. // It's the Barbababies's birthday. They all want to do something different with Barbapapa!

programme.title: E107 - Roar
programme.desc: It's the Roar Festival, and Tim wants to have the best Roar in town.

programme.title: E104 - Tooth On The Loose / Scaredy Croc
programme.desc: When Mr. Crocodile loses a tooth, Daisy wants to make sure he gets a visit from the tooth fairy. // Mr. Crocodile, Daisy and their friends are scared to fetch Martin's gloves from his spooky shed.

programme.title: E103 - Boris / Born To Be Wild
programme.desc: The barbababies find a lost baby elephant and secretly look after it. How will Barbapapa and Barbamama react to Boris? // Boris the elephant misses home. The Barbapapa decide to bring him back to Africa. On the spot, they help Boris to acclimatize.

programme.title: E714 - Pups Save A Rocket Roller Skater / Pups Save Ryder's Surprise
programme.desc: A mix-up delivery leads to Ms. Marjorie and Danny speeding out of control in Adventure Bay. Now the Pups must rescue them. // Ryder's present ends up in the jungle and Carlos is trapped in a Jungle Gym. It's up to the Pups to save them.

programme.title: E502 - The New House
programme.desc: Peppa and George are taken to visit the home that Mr Bull is building. Will they find out who their new neighbors are?

programme.title: E424 - Paper Aeroplanes
programme.desc: Some of Daddy Pig's important work papers have gone missing – because Mummy Pig, Peppa and George have accidentally made them into paper airplanes.

programme.title: E109 - Borrower Daisy / Can Do Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile and Daisy try to figure out which of her friends borrowed her game and didn't return it. // A perfect 'Step-Mother's' day for Maggie all depends on Daisy and Mr. Crocodile finding a can opener.

programme.title: E121 - The Crew Fixes The Talent Show Stage / The Crew Builds Instruments
programme.desc: When Speed Meister sabotages the stage for the town Talent Show, the pups use Motor's talent to save the day. // Sierra Sparkle is coming to sing for Builder Cove Day! But when the band's instruments break, Rubble & Crew have a construction solution.

programme.title: E204 - The Floor Is Guava / We Are The Grumples
programme.desc: Boots wants to enjoy Banana Fest, but the Guava Geyser is erupting! Dora needs to stop the geyser and save the festival. / It's Picture Day, but the Grumpy Old Troll runs away! Dora follows him into Troll World to get him to come out for the picture.

programme.title: E822 - Bird Spotting
programme.desc: Peppa and George are birdwatching with Grandpa Pig. They look for different birds and tick them off in Grandpa Pig's book.

programme.title: E411 - Power Tires
programme.desc: When his tires get popped, Blaze thinks he's out of the race for good. Luckily, Gabby is there with a new set of Power Tires - high-tech wheels that can transform into anything Blaze needs to keep rolling.

programme.title: E226 - The Crew Builds A Lifeguard Tower
programme.desc: It's the perfect beach day in Builder Cove! If Rubble & Crew can build a lifeguard tower so the beach can open...

programme.title: E103 - Boris / Born To Be Wild

programme.desc: The barbababies find a lost baby elephant and secretly look after it. How will Barbapapa and Barbamama react to Boris? // Boris the elephant misses home. The Barbapapa decide to bring him back to Africa. On the spot, they help Boris to acclimatize.

E5 - Deadly Rivals
programme.desc: Enter the world of a wild dog pack whose bountiful hunting grounds are threatened when a clan of spotted hyenas moves in nearby. The vulnerable pups start to go hungry as the scavenging rivals steal their food and eventually raid their den.

programme.title: E3 - May-June - a Time of Volatility
programme.desc: Watch summer unfold in the Northern Hemisphere, while regions close to the equator enter the wet season and Southern Africa goes dry, creating scarcity for some creatures and bounty for others.

programme.title: E1 - The Drakensberg: Barrier of Spears
programme.desc: This documentary looks at the wildlife of The Drakensberg Mountain range. We take a look at how creatures survive in the hostile landscape, from the highest peaks to the rolling grasslands below.

programme.title: E2 - Gardens in the Clouds
programme.desc: The plants and animals of the Cloud Mountains have long captured our imagination. In a landscape defined by weather and threatened by invaders, see how indigenous forests survive by providing a sanctuary for life while opening a door to the past.

programme.title: E5 - Deadly Rivals
programme.desc: Enter the world of a wild dog pack whose bountiful hunting grounds are threatened when a clan of spotted hyenas moves in nearby. The vulnerable pups start to go hungry as the scavenging rivals steal their food and eventually raid their den.

programme.title: E1 - Catching Air
programme.desc: Watch beginners make their first leap into the air, like an Andean condor who must attend flight school before spreading its wings. Meet oddballs who soar without feathers and marvel at a peregrine falcon’s speed as it dives to catch its prey.

programme.desc: When his human friends and animal friends both accidentally get invited to his birthday bash at the local pizza palace, Adam has to find ways to keep the two groups apart or risk embarrassing himself in front of his old school's BMOC.

programme.title: E9 - Music City Usa
programme.desc: The chefs take a roadtrip to Nashville and have the honor of cooking on the stage of the Grand Ole Opry for country music sensation Hunter Hayes. Then they have to dig deep to create a dish inspired by a vibrant music memory. It’s a personal and emotional cook as the chefs put their hearts on a plate for a full table of Nashville food and music giants including Kings of Leon frontman Caleb Followill, model Lily Aldridge, and Chef Jonathan Waxman.

programme.title: News Watch 9
programme.desc: NHK's mainstay evening news program.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: A young reporter named Yoneko (Furukawa Kotone) visits Rosanjin (Fuji Tatsuya) in his later years, a towering figure in Japanese culinary and artistic aesthetics. Though bewildered by his imperious and self-centered behavior, she continues to call on him to take dictation for his memoir. As she witnesses his interactions with distinguished figures-including Yoshida Shigeru, Noguchi Isamu, and John D. Rockefeller III-Yoneko slowly begins to understand the real Rosanjin: a man who, for all his sharp words, regards cuisine as a form of art and pursues it with unwavering, uncompromising dedication.

programme.title: The Winning Meals Of Great Historical Figures 'Brothers In Arms'
programme.desc: What kind of meals did the great generals and people who made their marks on history eat? Comedy trio Neptune recreates the dishes with experts, exploring the lifestyle and philosophies of great historical figures of the past and present. In addition, the comedy skits by Neptune are a must-see!

programme.desc: NHK news commentators give their views on current issues.

programme.title: E81
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan's first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Hope For India's Widows - The Holi Festival
programme.desc: India's widows suffer from exclusion and stigmatization. For decades, they have been fighting for more rights, with the help of NGOs. For the first time, widows are allowed to celebrate the festival of colors at the Gopinath Temple - a breakthrough.

programme.title: Can Ai Help Save The Environment?
programme.desc: Scientists are using AI in many environmental projects to help analyze data and accelerate processes. But at the same time, complex AI systems require significant resources. AI and sustainability: Is it a good fit?

programme.title: Why Is There A Black Market For Refrigerants In The Eu, And How Does It Wor
programme.desc: Reforms to phase out the most polluting gases are increasing prices for certified imports, and fueling a black market for cheaper, illegal imports from China. But not all gases are illegal , so tracing illicit imports is difficult. Sanctions are low, profits are high. The global warming potential of one 10kg cylinder is the same as driving 1.5 times around the world.

Shaurya Aur Anokhi Ki Kahani
programme.desc: Shaurya, a male chauvinist who believes that every girl's future belongs in the kitchen, is in for a surprise when he crosses paths with Anokhi, a hardworking girl.

programme.desc: The host provides an in-depth analysis of some of the most shocking real-life crime stories in India and sheds light on how the victims fought back for justice.

programme.desc: A Tamil dentist and Punjabi businessman fall in love, navigating family expectations, parenting, and emotional complexities across cultures.

programme.desc: Vidhi, a young woman, falls in love with Devratha, a middle-aged tycoon. Together they embark on a journey of love, and acceptance beyond the barrier of age.

programme.title: House Of Lies
programme.desc: House of Lies is an intense, family-centered drama about two mothers who face off against each other. Shaped by painful pasts, they clash in a fierce battle marked by betrayal, hidden family secrets, and a fight for survival.

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. programme.title: E38 - In Uzes (3)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Uzes, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in the national stud farm of Uzes and in the black truffle.

programme.title: E1 - The Music Of Transmission/Freshwater Surfer
programme.desc: Nature, tradition and rock'n'roll, for the Bonvins it's a family story. Paul and his children form a group: Paul Mac Bonvin & The Bullfrogs. Steeve Fleury is stand-up paddle champion and artist. Whether riding them or drawing them, waves and water are his passions.

programme.title: E11 - The Energy Of Volcanoes
programme.desc: In Auvergne, volcanoes reign supreme. Loic Ballet meets many personalities who are specialists in volcanoes, and especially committed to their preservation and properties.

programme.desc: Rob and Monica work in one of Europe's last remaining family-owned 'grande dame' hotels - boasting a deep history and celebrity clientele list right in the heart of the Eternal City.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: E604 - Yay Or Neigh?
programme.desc: There's no horsing around when a statue made of turquoise moseys on in. Will it be a yay, or a neigh for Rick? Then, Chum spins over to LA to have a record collection appraised.

programme.title: E3 - The Nazi's Secret Weapon
programme.desc: After finding Nazi artifacts at a sunken pier, Darrell continues his search to a site known as Target 3 where they find a possible component of a Nazi secret weapon that changes their investigation.

programme.desc: Throughout ancient cultures, there are stories of god-like beings providing instruction to early humans, helping our ancestors to establish the first civilisations and teaching them. Could it be true?

programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

programme.title: E5 - Singapore
programme.desc: Jack cooks his dad’s steak and kidney pudding recipe at home in Cornwall, before taking it to Singapore. He makes a deconstructed version of the traditional British dish.

programme.title: E3 - Highlights 3
programme.desc: Tensions reach boiling point as the celebrities face their toughest challenge yet. First, they navigate a powerful river to reach their camp, where they must build shelters and catch their supper without the usual army rations in sight. Then, a tropical storm strikes and water begins to flood the base, making for their worst night so far. The next morning, the contestants have to call on their newly acquired knot-tying skills to transform two unstable canoes into a catamaran and travel across to an island two miles away.

programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: “Money Movers” provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day.
